nodes.label: RTK (Rust Token Killer)
nodes.rationale: Prefix dev commands with `rtk` so output is token-filtered when a dedicated filter exists and passed through unchanged otherwise; goal is 60-90% token reduction on common build/test/git/package operations while staying always-safe to use.

nodes.label: HTML to Figma system
nodes.rationale: Rebuild a captured webpage as editable native Figma layers (frames, text, vectors, image fills) rather than a flat screenshot, via three cooperating packages.

nodes.label: Capture-to-Figma data flow
nodes.rationale: extension captures DOM -> POST http://localhost:3000/capture -> figma-plugin GETs the latest capture -> builds Figma nodes.

nodes.label: Branch Restructure Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Git-operations plan (not code-feature): finish development-side edits, push development, reshape main from a single history-preserving removal commit (no force-push), with approval gates before every push and before setting the default branch.

nodes.label: Runnable core (main branch)
nodes.rationale: main holds only the files needed to build and run the app (backend, extension, figma-plugin minus test-stops.cjs, plus README/LICENSE/.gitignore) so a visitor can clone main and run it end-to-end; reshaped via a removal commit (not orphan/force) to preserve history and stay reversible with git revert; main stays GitHub's default branch.

nodes.label: sync-main-from-dev.sh script
nodes.rationale: Carries future core changes development -> main; syncs only package code (backend/extension/figma-plugin), never the main-owned README/LICENSE/.gitignore, and drops the excluded figma-plugin/test-stops.cjs standalone regression test.

nodes.label: Phase 0 Type-check Gate Spec
nodes.rationale: extension has never been type-checked (Vite/esbuild strip types without checking), hiding 51 real tsc errors; in a rendering-fidelity tool 'looks slightly wrong' IS the bug, so a cheap type gate plus CI buys a safety net without runtime changes.

nodes.label: typecheck.yml CI gate
nodes.rationale: Runs on ubuntu-latest (tsc is OS-agnostic, unlike the Windows-generated visual-diff test), matrix over [extension, figma-plugin, backend], each job npm ci + npm run typecheck on Node 24 LTS; tsc's native non-zero exit fails the check.
